title: be going to (do)
desc: 계획된 의도 또는 근거 있는 예측
examples: Good morning everybody, I just woke up so I'm going to show you my daily morning routine.
So I'm going to open the bottle and take a sip.
Now I'm going to go brush my teeth, let's go.
So I've got my toothbrush and my toothpaste and I am going to squeeze the toothpaste onto my toothbrush and now I'll brush my teeth.
Now I am wiping my mouth with a towel and I'm all done, my teeth are squeaky clean, now I'm going to do a little bit of stretching and meditation.

title: will / shall
examples: So I've got my toothbrush and my toothpaste and I am going to squeeze the toothpaste onto my toothbrush and now I'll brush my teeth.

title: had better / it's time
examples: After I meditate, it's time to make my bed.
I got dressed and now it's time for my favorite part of my morning routine, eating breakfast and drinking coffee.

title: Passive (is done / was done)
examples: The bed is made, I'm going to go take a shower now.

title: Passive (special: get + p.p.)
examples: I got dressed and now it's time for my favorite part of my morning routine, eating breakfast and drinking coffee.
